prompt: Map ADS Badge to VPK badge component — full enrichment with ADS state tokens and create variant demo files that mirror the ADS docs examples structure.

assertions.name: preserves-shadcn-variant-names
assertions.description: Keeps default, secondary, destructive, outline — not renamed to ADS names like primary, danger

assertions.name: ads-state-tokens-applied
assertions.description: Hover/active/disabled states use ADS token triplets per variant (not generic opacity patterns)

assertions.name: bold-vs-subtle-disabled
assertions.description: Bold variants use disabled:bg-bg-disabled, subtle variants use opacity-(--opacity-disabled)

assertions.name: demo-files-created
assertions.description: At least 2 variant demo files exist in components/website/demos/ui/badge/

assertions.name: demos-mirror-ads-structure
assertions.description: Demo names and content are based on ADS Badge docs examples, not invented from the API surface

assertions.name: named-props-interface
assertions.description: BadgeProps interface is exported with Readonly<> wrapper

assertions.name: lint-passes
assertions.description: pnpm run lint reports no new errors on modified files

assertions.name: typecheck-passes
assertions.description: pnpm tsc --noEmit reports no new errors
